name: Fiery Barbecued Venison
recipeIngredient: 4 Venison steaks or medallions (about 4 oz. per portion)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the meat spices in a large bowl.
2. Place the venison in the bowl and mix to coat well.
3. Brush off excess coating and let stand for 1 hour.
4. Heat the barbecue grill; oil the grill.
5. Brown venison over high heat, turning often and basting lightly with olive oil.
6. When done to your taste, remove from grill, cover with foil, and let stand about 5 minutes.
7. Serve with coriander cream.
Coriander Avocado Cream:
1/2 Avocado (~4 tablespoons)
3 Tablespoons Sour cream
2 Tablespoons Fresh chopped coriander
1/2 teaspoon Grated lime peel
4 Drops Tabasco sauce
Salt
Pepper
Olive oil for basting (Southwestern-style dish from the Cervena venison people)
